mnemonics: CLASSy Models: Classes Are Structured Systems
keyPoints: Identifies and defines classes, attributes, and methods from requirements
Uses class diagrams to visualize system structure and relationships
Helps establish a static view of the system architecture before dynamic modeling
commonMistakes: Defining classes that are too granular or too broad in responsibility
Creating redundant classes that overlap in functionality
Focusing only on entities while neglecting control or boundary classes
